HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Teresa Chavez, 415-385-0895 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant presents delinquent utility bills and submits a copy of a document to the Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF TERESA CHAVEZ AKA TERESA M. CHAVEZ.

Taken under submisson.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing the Court signs an Order granting the Judgment debtor's claim of exemption and orders the levying offices to release any earnings held to the Judgment debtor. (see scanned order for details)***
